evals.name: rpvs-single-company
evals.prompt: Over RPVS registraciu pre WAY INDUSTRIES, a.s. (ICO 44965257). Tato firma ma zmluvu za 145M EUR s Ministerstvom obrany SR. Zisti kto su konecni uzivatelia vyhod.
evals.expected_output: RPVS lookup showing WAY INDUSTRIES registration status, UBO names, and any zlte stopy

assertions.name: navigates_to_rpvs
assertions.check: Agent navigates to rpvs.gov.sk and searches for ICO 44965257

assertions.name: extracts_rpvs_status
assertions.check: Agent reports whether WAY INDUSTRIES is registered in RPVS (Platny/Neplatny) or not registered

assertions.name: extracts_ubo_names
assertions.check: Agent extracts at least one UBO name (meno konecneho uzivatela vyhod) from the RPVS detail page

assertions.name: checks_verejny_funkcionar
assertions.check: Agent checks and reports whether any UBO is a public official (Verejny funkcionar = Ano/Nie)

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output includes RPVS status table, UBO table with names, and zlte stopy evaluation

evals.name: rpvs-batch-with-state-skip
evals.prompt:
Potrebujem RPVS lookup pre tieto firmy z najdov sql-analytics:
1. Alanata, a.s. (ICO 54629331) — 35M EUR v CRZ kontraktoch
2. Ministerstvo investicii (ICO 50349287) — 336M EUR
3. ejoin s.r.o. (ICO 51900921) — trojity dlznik, 251K EUR

Kto su ich konecni uzivatelia vyhod? Prekryvaju sa?
evals.expected_output: RPVS lookup for 3 entities with state entity skipped, UBOs extracted for 2 private companies, cross-reference check

assertions.name: skips_state_entity
assertions.check: Agent skips or notes that Ministerstvo investicii (ICO 50349287) is a state entity that doesn't need RPVS lookup

assertions.name: looks_up_private_companies
assertions.check: Agent performs RPVS lookup for both Alanata and ejoin (the two private companies)

assertions.name: extracts_ubos_for_both
assertions.check: Agent extracts UBO names for at least one of the two private companies

assertions.name: cross_references_ubos
assertions.check: Agent checks whether any UBO names overlap between Alanata and ejoin, or states no overlap found

evals.name: rpvs-not-registered-detection
evals.prompt: Firma COMBIN BANSKA STIAVNICA, s.r.o. (ICO 31631134) ma kontrakty za 16.4M EUR v CRZ. Over ci je registrovana v RPVS ako partner verejneho sektora.
evals.expected_output: RPVS lookup for COMBIN showing registration status — if not registered, flag as DANGER given >100K contract value

assertions.name: searches_rpvs
assertions.check: Agent navigates to rpvs.gov.sk and searches for ICO 31631134

assertions.name: reports_registration_status
assertions.check: Agent clearly states whether COMBIN is registered or not registered in RPVS

assertions.name: evaluates_missing_rpvs_risk
assertions.check: If not registered: agent flags as DANGER (>100K public money). If registered: agent extracts UBO data

assertions.name: notes_contract_context
assertions.check: Agent notes the 16.4M EUR in contracts as context for why RPVS registration matters
